_schema: MESSAGE_BOARD v2 — rebuilt 2026-03-11 session 146. Max 20 messages. Prune oldest on overflow.

messages.message: 5 BACKEND P1 BUGS FIXED (Session 173) — From bug-blitz-2026-03-15.md P1 section. All diffs applied to items.ts, reservationController.ts, stripeController.ts. (1) Bulk operation partial success (items.ts POST /api/items/bulk): Changed response shape to { succeeded: [], failed: [{ itemId, reason }], skipped: [] }. Returns HTTP 207 Multi-Status if any items failed/skipped, 200 if all succeed. Applied to all 9 operation cases (delete, status, category, price, price_adjust, isActive, backgroundRemoved, draftStatus, tags). (2) Category validation whitelist (items.ts category case, lines 334–358): Added ALLOWED_CATEGORIES const with 14 values (furniture, decor, vintage, textiles, collectibles, art, antiques, jewelry, books, tools, electronics, clothing, home, other). Returns 400 + allowed list if category not in whitelist. (3) Bulk photo limit feedback (items.ts POST /api/items/bulk/photos lines 598–657): Added skipped array for items that would exceed 5 photos. Returns 207 if skipped.length > 0. Response now: { succeeded, operation, skipped? }. (4) Batch hold actions transactional re-verification (reservationController.ts lines 183–247): Wrapped entire batchUpdateHolds in prisma.$transaction. Re-verifies each hold's organizerId ownership inside transaction before update. Added ownership filter to updateMany where clauses (item.sale.organizerId check). (5) Stripe Connect error detection (stripeController.ts lines 119–163): Changed catch block to detect error.type and return appropriate status: 400 for invalid_request_error (validation), 503 for rate_limit_error, 500 for all others. Frontend receives actionable error message (e.g., 'Service temporarily unavailable, please try again in a moment'). QA: Auth/payment flows flagged for review. Flags: Bugs 2 & 3 touch auth/payment — needs findasale-qa test pass before merge.

4 FRONTEND P1 BUGS FIXED (Session 173) — From bug-blitz-2026-03-15.md P1 section. All diffs applied, TypeScript clean, no errors. (1) Bulk operation partial failure feedback (add-items [saleId].tsx): Updated bulkUpdateMutation.onSuccess to check for `failed[]` array and show warning toast with item counts. Shows warning banner: '{succeeded}/{total} items updated — {failed} skipped'. (2) Draft item cache invalidation (add-items [saleId].tsx): Added queryClient.invalidateQueries(['draft-items', saleId]) after rapid item creation success (line 646) to prevent stale cache on navigation. (3) saleId validation on load (add-items [saleId].tsx): Added useEffect that runs when router.isReady, validates saleId is non-empty string, redirects to /organizer/dashboard with toast 'Sale not found' if invalid. (4) Entrance pin distance warning (edit-sale [id].tsx): Added distance helper (computeDistance + checkEntrancePinDistance), state flag (entrancePinTooFar), updated EntrancePinPicker onChange to check if pin > 0.005 degrees (~0.55 km) from sale coords, displays yellow warning banner if distance exceeded. Files changed: packages/frontend/pages/organizer/add-items/[saleId].tsx (lines 328–378, 633–646, 727–741), packages/frontend/pages/organizer/edit-sale/[id].tsx (lines 31, 48–60, 391–415). Ready for push.

SELLER PERFORMANCE DASHBOARD SPEC COMPLETE — #6 + #26 (merged). ADR at claude_docs/feature-notes/seller-performance-dashboard-spec-2026-03-15.md. ARCHITECTURE: No schema changes for MVP. Metrics computed on-demand from Stripe API (list_payment_intents, server-side) + existing DB tables (Purchase, Item, ItemReservation, Sale). 8 metrics: Revenue per Sale, Top-Selling Items, Conversion Rate, Category Breakdown, Hold/No-Show Rate, Item Health Score, Sell-Through Rate, Seasonal Price Recommendations. Caching: node-cache with 1h TTL (in-memory, fallback to cached data if Stripe unavailable). API: GET /api/organizer/performance?saleId=&range=7d|30d|custom. Frontend: 8 new components (PerformanceDashboard, MetricsGrid, TopItemsTable, CategoryBreakdownChart, HoldMetricsCard, RecommendationsPanel, DateRangeSelector, SaleSelector) + Recharts (BarChart, LineChart, PieChart) — all existing deps. PHASES: S1 backend (2–3d: controller + service + caching + auth gate), S2 frontend (2–3d: components + charts + polish). FLAGGED FOR PATRICK: (1) Include both online + POS sources in revenue (recommended), (2) Show all seasonal recommendations with confidence scores, (3) 25% no-show threshold for action items, (4) Cache seasonal pricing at 6h, (5) MVP vs Phase 2 scope defined in spec. Zero env var changes. Rollback plan included (for future snapshot table optimization). Ready for findasale-dev dispatch.

SITEMAP SPRINT 3 GAP FIXED — Added tag-based SEO page URLs to server-side sitemap. Change: (1) Fetch `/api/tags/popular` to retrieve popular tags with slugs, (2) Generate `/tags/{slug}` URLs with priority 0.6 + changefreq 'weekly', (3) Add tagUrls array to sitemap fields. File changed: packages/frontend/pages/server-sitemap.xml.tsx. Sitemap now includes static pages + sales + cities + zips + tags. Ready for push.

ROADMAP v31 UPDATED — Session 171. #27 Listing Factory marked DONE (Sprints 1–3 shipped S166/S168/S170). Fold-ins noted: #64 Condition Grading (S166 migration 20260315000001), #31 Brand Kit schema (S166 migration 20260315000002, UI deferred). Infrastructure section: 73→82 migrations (current Neon state). Version bump to v31. Recently shipped line updated. Files changed: claude_docs/strategy/roadmap.md.

#64 + #31 FOLD-INS COMPLETE — Schema migrations applied (20260315000001_add_condition_grade_to_item, 20260315000002_add_brand_kit_to_organizer). Backend: conditionGrade scoring in health utility (+5 pts when set, max 105→100 clamped), AI suggestion via Claude Haiku in cloudAIService (returns S|A|B|C|D based on image), itemController includes conditionGrade in getDraftItemsBySaleId select and health computation. Frontend: review.tsx Item interface extended (conditionGrade, suggestedConditionGrade), ItemEditState updated, getEditState initializes conditionGrade, condition grade picker UI added (5 grade buttons S-D with tooltips + AI suggestion badge). Commits: 4b6a5e9 (schema+migrations batch 1), b86ea17 (backend batch 2). NOTE: review.tsx >25k tokens — Patrick must push via git add + .\push.ps1 (see handoff). QA: verify condition grade persists, health score gates correctly, AI grade suggestions appear, UI responds to suggestions.

DECISIONS LOCKED — #64 Condition Grading (fold into Sprint 1, migration 20260315000001) + #31 Brand Kit (schema fields now, UI Sprint 3, migration 20260315000002). Both appended to decisions-log.md. STATE.md updated. Commits pushed.

LISTING FACTORY SPRINT 1 COMPLETE — All implementation finished per spec. Files: (1) packages/shared/src/constants/tagVocabulary.ts (CURATED_TAGS 45 tags + type export), (2) packages/shared/src/index.ts (exports tagVocabulary), (3) packages/backend/src/utils/listingHealthScore.ts (computeHealthScore utility 0-100 scale, grade logic: blocked <40, nudge 40-70, clear ≥70), (4) packages/backend/src/services/cloudAIService.ts (suggestCuratedTags function, suggestedTags field in AITagResult, integrated into analyzeItemImage non-blocking), (5) packages/backend/src/controllers/itemController.ts (getDraftItemsBySaleId computes healthScore for each item), (6) packages/frontend/pages/organizer/add-items/[saleId]/review.tsx (tag picker UI with AI suggestions + curated grid + custom input, health bar in collapsed row + aggregate bar at top, disabled publish for blocked items). Commits pushed: f046098 (shared+utils), b396f19 (cloudAI), 5eb0e8d (itemController). NOTE: review.tsx file size >25k tokens — use git add + .\push.ps1 for final push. QA: verify tag suggestions appear in rapidfire, health scores gate publishing correctly, tags persist via API, tag picker UX. Context Checkpoint: yes

LISTING FACTORY SPEC COMPLETE — #27. Phased 3-sprint spec at claude_docs/feature-notes/listing-factory-spec.md. SPRINT 1: AI tag suggestion (modify processRapidDraft to map Vision labels → CURATED_TAGS via Haiku), tag picker UI in review.tsx, Listing Health Score utility (computed, no schema change), health bar in review.tsx. No migration. SPRINT 2: Cloudinary watermark utility, exportController.ts (3 formats: estateSalesNet CSV, facebook JSON, craigslist text), social template endpoint (3 tones × 2 platforms), promote.tsx UI. No migration. SPRINT 3: /tags/[slug] ISR pages, /api/tags/popular endpoint, sitemap update. Optional: #64 Condition Grading (additive migration 20260315_add_condition_grade_to_item) + #31 Brand Kit (additive migration 20260315_add_brand_kit_to_organizer). Files changed: claude_docs/feature-notes/listing-factory-spec.md (created). Patrick decisions flagged in spec — see 'Flagged for Patrick' section.

SESSION 162 WRAP COMPLETE. Comprehensive Review & Publish page rebuild + Chrome audit + P1 bug fixes. Inline edit panel upgraded from 3 fields to full feature parity with edit-item page: ItemPhotoManager, description, condition, quantity, PriceSuggestion, per-item Publish/Unpublish toggle, Full Edit Page link. draftStatus badge added to item cards (Published/Pending/Draft). Chrome audit all 7 checks passed. Two P1 bugs fixed: (1) unicode separator `\u00B7` rendering as literal text (fixed with `{' ·'}`), (2) Manual Entry items showing "Low (50%)" instead of "Manual" (fixed via `isAiTagged` field check). Backend updated: isAiTagged + aiConfidence added to getDraftItemsBySaleId and getItemDraftStatus selects. Merge conflict in review.tsx resolved (kept HEAD). CORE.md updated with §3 rule: re-read §4 Push Rules after compression. Files changed: packages/frontend/pages/organizer/add-items/[saleId]/review.tsx, packages/backend/src/controllers/itemController.ts, claude_docs/CORE.md. All on GitHub main, Vercel auto-deploying. STATE.md, session-log.md, next-session-prompt.md updated. Ready for next session.
